testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule returns 400 when schedule target is missing
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule returns 400 when schedule target is missing

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule accepts and executes a new archive job
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule accepts and executes a new archive job

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates repeated archive jobs within ttl window
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates repeated archive jobs within ttl window

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule returns failed job state when archive execution throws
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule returns failed job state when archive execution throws

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates failed jobs during exponential backoff window
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule deduplicates failed jobs during exponential backoff window

testcase.classname: pages/api/archive/schedule allows retry after failed job backoff expires and blacklists after repeated failures
testcase.name: pages/api/archive/schedule allows retry after failed job backoff expires and blacklists after repeated failures

testcase.classname: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal detects completed archive pages only when archived status and stable url both exist
testcase.name: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal detects completed archive pages only when archived status and stable url both exist

testcase.classname: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal prefers configured qiniu provider when qiniu env is complete
testcase.name: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal prefers configured qiniu provider when qiniu env is complete

testcase.classname: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal derives qiniu upload url from region when upload url is omitted
testcase.name: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal derives qiniu upload url from region when upload url is omitted

testcase.classname: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal prefers configured r2 provider when r2 env is complete
testcase.name: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal prefers configured r2 provider when r2 env is complete

testcase.classname: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal reports provider diagnostics for incomplete qiniu configuration
testcase.name: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal reports provider diagnostics for incomplete qiniu configuration

testcase.classname: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal reports provider diagnostics for incomplete r2 configuration
testcase.name: lib/server/archiveTaskRunner __internal reports provider diagnostics for incomplete r2 configuration
